CustomField.formula: IF( AND( Agency2_EvaluationPointSum__c >= 91,Agency2_EvaluationPointSum__c <= 100), 1.4, IF( AND(Agency2_EvaluationPointSum__c >= 81,Agency2_EvaluationPointSum__c <= 90), 1.3, IF( AND(Agency2_EvaluationPointSum__c >= 71,Agency2_EvaluationPointSum__c <= 80), 1.2, IF( AND(Agency2_EvaluationPointSum__c >= 61,Agency2_EvaluationPointSum__c <= 70), 1.1, IF( AND(Agency2_EvaluationPointSum__c >= 51,Agency2_EvaluationPointSum__c <= 60), 1.0, IF( AND(Agency2_EvaluationPointSum__c >= 41,Agency2_EvaluationPointSum__c <= 50), 0.9, VALUE(TEXT(Agency2_Factor_FunctionEvaluationUnder40__c) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: 代理店2_係数_機能評価
